---
title: "2024_ITW"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)

itw <- read_sav("data/ITW_2024.sav")
glimpse(itw)
summary(itw)
nrow(itw)
names(itw)
```

```{r}
itw <- itw |>
  mutate(
    wave = factor(Wave, levels = c("Q1_2024", "Q2_2024" , "Q3_2024" , "Q4_2024"))
  )
```

```{r}
saveRDS (itw , "data/itw_clean.rds")
```

```{r}
itw <- readRDS("data/itw_clean.rds")
```

```{r}
summary((itw$K6score))
summary((itw$BAT12_total))
```

```{r}
aggregated_itw <- itw |>
  group_by(Wave) |>
  summarise(
    mean_K6score = mean(K6score, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```
